reviews.review_title: Good game but for some reason empty
reviews.review_description: I really like this game because it was exactly what I was looking for so many medivel that are paid don't life sized battles, but there is one problem, it is so empty, like I thought had tons of people in the pvp but now most of the time, when you join pvp it's only and on rare cases it's only one person I played the game for a long time so I'll keep trying and there isn't even voice chat not the best so far

reviews.review_title: Uhhh it’s good but not too good??
reviews.review_description: Great game, I love it a lot, but there are issues. Once you reach level 11 on arena, you fight people who are level 100 with everything in the game, frankly it’s not fair. And the gems, the gems are one of the main currencies for everything, and sometimes the only currency for things like bows, armour, spells, etc. and you have to pay to get the gems? Again, not fair for the free to play people such as me. I like the game, but it needs to have a lot of changes
I did every setting possible but I couldnt hear anyone. The game sucks because of this please fix it devs

reviews.review_title: Could be better has good potential
reviews.review_description: I love this game but after you reach level 11 people are straight up just toxic I can't join a lobby without getting people being super toxic to me for being "trash" while they're over there flexing they spend over $100 on the game to get everything good but some people just can't do that like me I don't have money to spend on the game like that. And don't get me started on the gyms the gyms are impossible to get I mean yes I know there's a chest and stuff you can get every day but you get like 50 gems a day and you can barely afford anything to buy you have to wait at least like 40 to 20 days just to save up and then there's ice spammers I hate them

reviews.review_title: I like the game but there are problems
reviews.review_description: I wrote the 5 star for the free gems you get if you do but I would actually rate it 4 great game but the gems well you get 50 a day if you find the chest witch a mid tier spell takes around 30 days to get or you can spend money and the matchmaking is pretty bad so overall I like the game but it does really need to fix some stuff
Super sigma game i need free spells

First of all, the community is toxic, I went into a lobby and someone was literally saying he banged some other guys mom. Second, gems are IMPOSSIBLE to get. Example, it takes about 30 days to get a basic spell, for a better spell, it take 90 DAYS, 90 DAYS. Furthermore, rarities? Don't matter, commons, rares, and epics ask so the same damage. Also, COMMONS are locked behind Lvl 50 requirements. (some) AND Lvl 11 are being placed with Lvl 100S. Make it so every 10 Lvls you get put in a new group of players who are around the same Lvl as you. Other than that, I have no positive feedback.
It’s a fun game with a fun concept and I want my diamonds for this review
